description: Proactive Email Notifications and Weekly Review (Backend): email fallback in proactive scheduler + notification preferences + weekly review agent and route
steps: 1. Update backend/app/db/models.py: add notification_preferences dict to User model (default: {email_notifications: True, email_for_urgent_only: False}). This controls whether the proactive scheduler emails the user.

2. Update backend/app/scheduler/proactive.py - in _check_user_deadlines: after generating the nudge and checking if user is NOT connected via WebSocket (manager.is_connected(user_id) == False), send the nudge as a Gmail email using direct Gmail API (pattern from email agent's _send_email). Get user's google_tokens from UserRepository, use refresh token to get fresh access token via google.oauth2.credentials.Credentials with refresh. Create HTML email with ChronAI branding, nudge message, and 'Open ChronAI' button. Respect notification_preferences: skip if email_notifications=False, skip non-urgent if email_for_urgent_only=True.

3. Create backend/app/agents/review.py - generate_weekly_review(user_id, auth_token, mcp_client) async function: fetches last 7 days of calendar events (via MCP google-calendar list_events), completed tasks (via MCP google-tasks list_tasks with show_completed=True), habit check-ins (via HabitRepository). Uses Gemini to generate personalized review with: tasks completed vs total, meetings count, habit streaks/misses, productivity score, suggestion for next week. Returns markdown-formatted text.
4. Create a ReviewAgent class in backend/app/agents/review.py that inherits AgentBase, name='review'. Its execute() method calls generate_weekly_review and returns the result.
5. Add route GET /api/review/weekly?auth_token=... in backend/app/main.py that calls generate_weekly_review and returns the markdown text.

6. Update backend/app/agents/orchestrator.py SYSTEM_PROMPT: add 'review' to Available agents, add routing rules for 'weekly review' / 'how was my week' / 'productivity report' / 'weekly summary' to route to review agent.

8. Add backend/tests/test_review.py: test generate_weekly_review with mocked MCP and Gemini. Test proactive email sending logic (mock gmail send, test that email is sent when user is disconnected and preferences allow it). At least 4 test cases.
9. Verify: python -c 'import app.main' passes, python -m pytest tests/ -v passes
acceptance_criteria: python -c 'import app.main' passes with ReviewAgent registered
Proactive scheduler sends email when user is offline (not connected via WS)
Orchestrator routes 'how was my week' to review agent
python -m pytest tests/ -v passes including new tests
findings: All 116 tests pass (9 new). The generate_weekly_review standalone function needs explicit patching of app.agents.review.vertexai and app.agents.review.GenerativeModel in tests (the conftest autouse mock only patches the global vertexai.generative_models.GenerativeModel which does not affect already-imported name bindings). The classify_urgency function returns 'gentle' / 'urgent' / 'critical' (not 'high'), so email_for_urgent_only checks for urgency in ('critical', 'urgent').
